title: DomainIdentity
description: Named principal that acts within the domain. Anchors all downstream derivation trees: every operator, service, and workload in the ONT platform traces its authority to a DomainIdentity. No controller runs at Layer 0.

name.description: Canonical name of this domain identity. Unique within the ONT domain (e.g., guardian, platform, wrapper, conductor, seam-core).

spiffeTrustDomain.description: SPIFFE trust domain associated with this identity (e.g., spiffe://ontai.dev/guardian). Used for workload identity federation and mTLS.

ontWebSubject.description: ONT Web subject identifier for this identity. Format: {name}.identity.ontai.dev

operatorOwner.description: Name of the Seam operator that owns and manages this identity (e.g., guardian, platform, wrapper, conductor, seam-core).

registeredAt.description: Timestamp when this domain identity was first registered in the ONT domain registry.

conditions.description: Standard Kubernetes condition array for this resource.

observedGeneration.description: Generation observed when this condition was set.
